hero.title: Lead the safety, environment and sustainability function.
hero.description: Director-level programmes for HSE professionals stepping up. Strategy, board reporting, ESG leadership, culture, and the financial fluency that gets you a seat at the executive table.

intro: Most HSE qualifications stop at the level of competent practice. Our leadership track picks up where they end — for senior managers and directors who need to run an HSE function as a strategic line of business, defend a multi-million-pound budget, and present to the board with the same rigour as their CFO.

courses.title: Leadership for HSE professionals (5-day intensive)
courses.summary: Flagship 5-day cohort. Strategy, board reporting, behavioural safety, ESG leadership, finance fluency. Capstone strategy presentation.
outcomes: Build and defend a 12-month HSE strategy on a single page
Present HSE performance and risk to a board in language they speak
Lead a behavioural-safety culture programme across multiple sites
Translate ESG ambition into operational KPIs

courses.title: HSE for senior leaders (2-day workshop)
courses.summary: A 2-day immersion for the C-suite, COOs and ops directors who need to know exactly what 'good' HSE looks like in their organisation.
outcomes: Understand your personal HSE accountability under company law
Read an HSE management report critically
Ask the right questions during incident reviews
Drive culture from the top — not just the HSE function

courses.title: ESG leadership masterclass
courses.summary: Three-day deep dive into ESG strategy, reporting frameworks (GRI, ISSB, CSRD) and how to integrate ESG into the existing HSE management system.
outcomes: Map your company's material ESG topics
Choose between GRI, ISSB and CSRD for your audience
Build a credible Scope-3 emissions inventory
Defend your ESG narrative to investors and analysts

courses.title: Behavioural safety leadership
courses.summary: How to design, launch and sustain a behavioural-safety programme that actually changes incident rates. 4-day cohort + 90-day post-cohort coaching.
outcomes: Diagnose your current safety-culture maturity
Design a behavioural-safety intervention with measurable KPIs
Train and coach your line managers as safety leaders
Sustain the programme past the typical 12-month decay curve
Move from operational HSE manager to strategic HSE leader
Defend an HSE budget with the rigour the CFO will respect
Lead behavioural-safety culture across multiple sites
Translate ESG ambition into operational KPIs and audit-ready evidence
Present complex HSE performance data to a non-technical board
Develop and mentor a high-performing HSE function
audience: HSE managers stepping into director-level roles
Newly-appointed HSE directors / heads of function
Sustainability / ESG leaders moving into a combined HSE+ESG remit
Senior consultants advising boards on HSE / ESG

cta.heading: Build your senior HSE bench.
cta.description: Tell us how many leaders, when, and which programme. We'll build a corporate cohort around your calendar and respond within one business day.
